ksa_text: Knowledge of data classification, sensitivity labeling, and access controls, including classification standards and policies, architectural enforcement mechanisms, and controls required to enforce data privacy and residency requirements by design.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Security & Privacy (domain affinity 0.30); strategic/governance framing outweighs technical signals. STRM composite score is strong (0.4258, top tier for this dataset). A working DE would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
